overview: The Tic Tac Toe Java application is a command-line interface (CLI) based game that allows two players to play against each other.
functionalRequirements: The game should display a 3x3 grid to the players.
The game should allow players to input their moves by specifying the row and column numbers.
The game should validate the player's input to ensure it is within the grid boundaries.
The game should update the grid after each move.
The game should check for a winner after each move.
The game should announce the winner or a draw if all squares are filled.
nonFunctionalRequirements: The game should be implemented in Java.
The game should run on the command-line interface (CLI).
The game should be easy to use and understand.
userInterface: The result of each move (valid or invalid)
The winner or a draw message
userExperience: The game will provide a simple and intuitive way for players to play Tic Tac Toe. The game will guide the players through each step, from inputting their moves to announcing the winner.

testing.integrationTesting: Integration testing for the entire game
testing.userAcceptanceTesting: User acceptance testing to ensure the game is easy to use and understand
